headline: Healthcare PE heating up, AI is lowkey a dealmaker, and leveling up your analyst game

stories.title: PE firms go all-in on healthcare quality plays
stories.summary: Healthcare PE is rebounding hard with a flight to quality into scalable niches like behavioral health, value-based care, and AI-enabled pharma services. Mega-funds returning to offense means way more competition for deals.
stories.takeaway: The best assets coming to market are cleaner earnings, stronger cash flows, and tech-enabled—that's what PE buyers actually care about in 2026.

stories.title: AI stops being a nice-to-have, becomes the whole deal
stories.summary: AI deployment in PE portfolio companies is shifting from short-term gains to infrastructure investments that actually move the needle on valuations. Acquirers now expect real productivity improvements, not just buzzwords.
stories.takeaway: If your portfolio company isn't embedding AI seriously into operations, you're leaving money on the table. Firms investing in real AI capability win 2026.

stories.title: Consulting 2026 is about execution, not just flexing frameworks
stories.summary: Consulting firms now want proof you can move ideas to action and handle real-world chaos—generic narratives get filtered out fast. Strong storytelling with visible direction and execution proof is fr the bar now.
stories.takeaway: Show a clear spike in an area you care about (healthcare, energy, ops, whatever) and concrete examples of delivering results despite messy constraints. That's what lands offers.

watchNext.title: Tech's resilience in PE—why SaaS and AI platforms are still hot
watchNext.why: TMT sector leads IPO pipelines with strong domestic exposure. If healthcare was your story, PE tech plays show where the next wave of exits goes.

watchNext.title: The continuation vehicle playbook—how PE unlocks aging assets
watchNext.why: Aged holdings are becoming the biggest structural challenge. Understanding CVs and sponsor-to-sponsor sales is lowkey essential knowledge for mid-market PE work.
